description: The TaskMaster app needs a database update. Add a 'priority' field (Int) with a default value of 0 to the Task entity in 'com/example/taskmaster/data/Task.kt'. Implement a Room migration from version 1 to 2 in 'com/example/taskmaster/data/AppDatabase.kt' by incrementing the database version and defining a Migration object named 'MIGRATION_1_2' that executes the SQL 'ALTER TABLE tasks ADD COLUMN priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0'. Ensure the migration is registered in the database builder and passes the project's unit tests.

metadata.expected_sql_fragment: ALTER TABLE tasks ADD COLUMN priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
